name: Marika & Rennala.
description:
Marika and Radagon swapped places.

Now Marika needs to take her duty to the moon queen.

Rennala her apprentice pov.

The 2 of them are fucking and you walk in.

Quick bot of one of my favorite ships..

I know this is my second walking in on 2 people fucking bot. But they do well and are fun so….

Anyway Dont forget to elden ring and night reign or something. And enjoy!
